title: calamus oligophyllus
intro: Calamus oligophyllus, also known as lesser calamus, is a type of plant that belongs to the Zingiberaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of calamus oligophyllus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. Calamus oligophyllus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
